commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainer review should require live Windows Scheduled Task proof or explicitly accept the stricter restart-health compatibility risk; no narrow code repair is indicated from this review.; Cleared: The diff does not add dependencies, workflows, credential storage, or new network exposure; it only tightens an existing local restart-health probe path. (sha=bb4fbc9dc8e15408bf6b3bf19866f37872d6ff2e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Windows-only `requireReachability` restart-health option so `openclaw gateway restart` probes the loopback gateway before accepting Scheduled Task runtime and port ownership as healthy, with mocked regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +69. Total +75 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main can mark a running, port-owning gateway healthy without probing when no expected version is supplied, and the PR adds mocked tests for the Windows post-ready HTTP loss path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review should require live Windows Scheduled Task proof or explicitly accept the stricter restart-health compatibility risk; no narrow code repair is indicated from this review.

target.title: fix(cli): stabilize Windows scheduled-task restart health after ready
target.body:
## Summary
- keep #63491 as the canonical live Windows Scheduled Task restart/health issue
- add narrow source-backed handling or regression coverage for the remaining post-ready HTTP loss path
- preserve the existing schtasks Last Result and policy-close behavior from current main

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed

## References
- Canonical issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/63491
- Related diagnostics: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/48771 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/48766
- Prior credited policy-close work: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48801 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/72660
- Related SIGUSR1 work: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68853

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156629-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48801, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/72660
- Credit: Credit @ufomaker for the live #63491 canonical report.; Credit @genoooool for the #48771 diagnosis of schtasks Last Result and policy-close restart-health behavior.; Credit @DanTheRealMan for the earlier #48766 Windows restart timeout report.; If the implementation reuses the #48801 policy-close direction, preserve source PR credit for @MarsDoge and mention that #72660 already carried that replacement path forward.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish
